overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a science fiction video game depicting an astronaut exploring a damaged industrial space facility. The character moves through a control room with emergency lighting, navigates debris-filled areas, and enters a corridor with overhead pipes.

agents.ego_description: walking slowly through the control room toward a desk with a seated figure in a spacesuit

notable_agents.action: seated astronaut slumped at desk, motionless in a spacesuit

entered.detail: wall covered with buttons, screens, and industrial control interfaces
large metal workstation with papers and equipment scattered on surface
tipped over storage unit with drawers open

segments.scene_description: The scene opens in a dimly lit industrial control room with green ambient lighting. The player character, wearing a spacesuit, stands near a metal desk where a motionless astronaut sits slumped in a chair. Control panels line the left wall while debris litters the floor, suggesting recent damage or abandonment.

scene_state.functional_zone: debris-filled damage zone with emergency lighting

events.description: exits control room and enters debris-filled area with intense red emergency lighting
turns right to navigate around large debris pile on the ground

agents.ego_description: navigating carefully through rubble and debris, turning toward a corridor entrance

entered.detail: large mound of rubble, broken concrete, and scattered materials blocking path
pile of metal and plastic containers stacked against wall
damaged equipment and twisted metal components

segments.scene_description: The character turns away from the control room and enters a heavily damaged area bathed in red emergency lighting. Large piles of debris and rubble cover the floor, forcing careful navigation around obstacles. Stacked crates line the left side as the character approaches a doorway leading deeper into the facility.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial maintenance corridor with ventilation system

events.description: enters narrow industrial corridor with large overhead ventilation pipes

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the corridor beneath large metal pipes

entered.detail: large cylindrical metal ductwork running along ceiling
metal paneled wall with industrial texture and piping

segments.scene_description: The character enters a narrow industrial corridor characterized by large overhead ventilation pipes running the length of the ceiling. The lighting shifts to a dimmer greenish ambient tone with less prominent red emergency lighting. The walls are lined with metal panels as the character continues forward through the maintenance tunnel.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a damaged industrial facility that shifts from a stagnant control room into a chaotic wreckage zone and finally into a narrow maintenance tunnel. It begins in a dimly lit control room bathed in green ambient light, where a spacesuit-clad character stands beside a slumped, motionless astronaut and debris-strewn consoles. As the character turns away, the scene transitions into a heavily damaged area dominated by red emergency lighting and large piles of rubble and crates that obstruct the path. The camera then follows the character through a doorway, where the environment shifts again into a narrow industrial corridor. Finally, the lighting returns to a dim greenish tone as the camera moves beneath large overhead ventilation pipes and along metal-paneled walls.
